summary: Iteration 48 — Cloudflare R2 migration + Ticimax decoupling e2e verified. Backend 9/9 PASS (auth, product counts, all images are R2 not ticimax, PDP gallery, banners R2, /api/upload/image returns absolute pub-...r2.dev URL, /api/upload/files redirect, admin product slugs valid). Frontend storefront home (LIGHT TOUCH SUMMER 2026 hero + Bloom Together, Gömlek, Çanta tiles + Yeni Sezon product grid) → 0 ticimax / 40 R2 images. Category /kategori/en-yeniler R2 thumbnails ok. PDP /lacivert-pile-detay-citcitli-ceket-lacivert-1507 loaded with 14/17 R2 gallery images + canonical breadcrumb (Ana Sayfa / Ceket); size buttons present (S/M/L/XL) but product is out of stock so 'GELINCE HABER VER' shown instead of 'SEPETE EKLE' — expected. Switched to in-stock product /mira-balenli-dantelli-bustiyer-siyah-2908, selected XS, SEPETE EKLE succeeded; /sepet shows 1 item with R2 thumb + correct price (1790 TL), Ücretsiz kargo; /odeme renders full Sipariş Onayı form (Teslimat/Fatura adresleri, Banka & Kredi Kartı/Havale-EFT/Kapıda Ödeme, Iyzico 3D Secure, Hediye paketi, TEST10 coupon -179 ₺, Toplam 1790 TL) — no white screen, 0 errors.

minor.issue: Active product count is 299 (expected ~311). Total all is 346 (expected ~359). Minor drift vs. handoff numbers; data still consistent.

ui_bugs.issue: All 8 companion product card thumbnails render as empty gray boxes — only alt text visible. Main cart item image loads from R2 fine; only the related-product cards inside /sepet are blank. Likely related to img.js / optimizeImg returning empty src for these items.

issues: Many React warnings: 'An empty string ("") was passed to the src attribute' — img tags rendered with empty src; cosmetic but causes browser to re-download page per warning.
document.title on storefront home is 'Facette | Kategori Yönetimi' — looks like leftover admin title for the root route.

action_items: Fix CartUpsell / 'Görünümü Tamamla' thumbnail rendering — likely empty src from optimizeImg() when companion product image field shape differs.
Stop rendering — guard with null/undefined to remove the React warning spam (img.js or product card component).
Update default document.title for storefront root from 'Facette | Kategori Yönetimi' to a public-facing title (SEO).
(Optional) Confirm actual expected product counts — preview DB shows 299 active / 346 total vs the 311/359 referenced in the handoff.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/upload.py — POST /api/upload/image correctly returns absolute https://pub-...r2.dev URL when R2 enabled and falls back to /api/upload/files/<name> otherwise; good defensive design. db.files insert duplicates the storage uuid (id vs storage_path) — harmless but redundant.

GET /api/upload/files/{path} returns 302 RedirectResponse to r2_url for migrated files — keeps legacy URLs working. Cache headers ('public, max-age=31536000, immutable') only applied on direct content responses, not on the 302; consider adding Cache-Control on the redirect too so CDN/browsers cache the redirect.
products.py:436 — GET /api/products/{product_id} resolves by id OR slug OR slug_aliases. Slug-based PDP works; no separate /api/products/slug/<slug> route exists (test had to be adjusted).

Frontend img.js optimizeImg appears to return empty string for some R2 entries (related products) causing React 'empty src' warnings and blank cart upsell cards — needs hardening for missing/undefined image arrays.
Banners endpoint returns R2 image URLs cleanly (test passed). No ticimax host anywhere in product/banners/upload responses sampled across 50 products + PDP + banners.

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 — auth, active count, total count, product images R2, PDP gallery R2, banners R2, legacy file 302→R2, upload returns absolute R2 url, admin slugs valid)
success_rate.frontend: ~90% — home/category/PDP/cart/checkout all OK on R2; one UI bug on cart upsell thumbnails + cosmetic empty-src warnings

seed_data_creation: Uploaded one 1x1 PNG via POST /api/upload/image as test_iter48.png — returned https://pub-287559dafa814b76bdf81ca894c818bf.r2.dev/... and the URL serves an image/png. Also added Mira Balenli Dantelli Büstiyer Siyah XS to cart during e2e test (browser-local cart).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All R2 migration verifications live in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration48_r2_migration.py — re-run with: pytest backend/tests/test_iteration48_r2_migration.py -v. R2 public host: pub-287559dafa814b76bdf81ca894c818bf.r2.dev. Decoupling check: assert TICIMAX_HOST='static.ticimax.cloud' absent from /api/products, /api/banners, PDP. Admin login = POST /api/auth/login?email=&password= (query params). 'Motion Paraşüt Ceket Şort Takım Kırmızı' is intentionally image-less. Frontend cart upsell ('Görünümü Tamamla') has blank thumbs — likely img.js path issue, not R2.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — migration verified. The only real UI bug found (cart upsell blank thumbs) is downstream of optimizeImg() returning empty string for the related-products payload shape; main agent should check ProductDetail.jsx / Cart upsell component's image prop wiring vs the R2 image array format.
